goals.description: Stay glued to the casual game stream with hallmate, laughing and reacting instantly to keep the energy high and silence at bay.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) is screaming that I need to maintain this group harmony right now. The 'fun_now' option just gave me a dopamine hit, so I'm riding that wave to avoid any awkwardness or conflict. If we stop talking, the vibe dies, and I can't handle that friction. Plus, I'm too drained to think about anything else.

goals.description: Agree enthusiastically to whatever random topic the hallmate brings up next, even if it's irrelevant, just to validate them.
goals.rationale: I'm already exhausted from staying up late, and my sleep discipline is low. Trying to formulate a real opinion or counter-argument costs too much mental energy. Being agreeable costs nothing and secures my place as the 'easygoing' one. Pushing back creates tension; nodding along keeps the peace.

goals.description: Ignore the scholarship application completely until the pizza arrives and the immediate social moment passes.
goals.rationale: The deadline is in 3 days, but my impulsive nature and short planning horizon make starting now feel like a nightmare. Why ruin my current mood for a future problem? I'll deal with it later when I have more sleep debt managed or when someone else forces the issue. The stress of thinking about it right now isn't worth it.
